input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.9.4.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:

            TITLE: definition – the motor(s) will respond to the input of the apps

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.9.4.1: Definition – the Motor(s) will respond to the input of the APPS
EV.9.4.1 Definition – the Motor(s) will respond to the input of the APPS

final_answer: Definition – the Motor(s) will respond to the input of the APPS
